title: Photon Detectors: SPADs, SNSPDs, and Photon Number Resolution
description: Master the technologies for detecting single photons, from silicon avalanche photodiodes to superconducting nanowire detectors, including photon-number-resolving capabilities.
learningObjectives: Understand the physics of single-photon avalanche diodes (SPADs)
Explain superconducting nanowire single-photon detector (SNSPD) operation
Compare key detector metrics: efficiency, dark counts, timing jitter
Analyze detector requirements for different quantum computing applications
